title: May SF Hadoop Users Meetup
description: The May SF Hadoop User Group meetup will be held Wednesday, May 14 from 6:00pm to 8:00pm. This meetup will be hosted by Flickr, located at 901 Mission St, San Francisco, CA 94105. Food and drinks will be served. Presentations: “Flickr Computer Vision and Image Processing at Scale” Huy, Pierre, and Ben/Hugo Flickr uses Storm and Hadoop extensively. For this session, we are focussing our presentation on one of the top most uses of Hadoop/Storm at Flickr. “New Data Serialization on Hadoop at Yahoo” Nandu Jayakumar
